treatment_information.treatment_response: Blood pressure improved by the time of discharge.

treatment_timeline.event: Patient presented to ED for hypotension.

patient_outcome.follow_up_details: Follow up with primary care provider within one week of discharge.
patient_outcome.long_term_prognosis: Improved kidney function and blood pressures are expected with fluid intake.
patient_outcome.quality_of_life: Patient remains independent, reports memory problems.
patient_outcome.patient_perspective: Patient was advised to drink more water to improve blood pressure and kidney function.
